description: Unlock a detailed view of the short score for securities. This endpoint provides ORTEX's proprietary composite score (0–100), offering rich and actionable insights into relative short-selling pressure and a clear perspective on market dynamics and investor positioning. Available Data Points: Date: Date for the short score data. (YYYY-MM-DD format). Short Score ORTEX composite score (0–100) indicating relative short-selling pressure. Try it out! You can test the API with the trial key TEST. Simply include it in your request headers; either here, or add the header "Ortex-Api-Key": "TEST" to your http request. Trial key restrictions: A list of randomly selected rows will be returned Get full access! Get a key at app.ortex.com/apis
